title: Skyblock Modpack!
description: My modpack for 1.21.10. Made for Hypixel Skyblock. Optimised for performance and dungeons.
body:
Modpack for Hypixel Skyblock

A modpack for enhancing user gameplay experience in Hypixel Skyblock.

Key Features:

Sodium: Enhance performance and visuals with Sodium, optimizing Minecraft to run smoothly while providing additional graphical tweaks. Quality of Life Enhancements: Improve gameplay convenience with mods like Skyblocker for quality of life improvements. Utility Mods: Utility mods like Roughly Enough Items (REI) for comprehensive item and block information, ensuring you're always equipped with the knowledge you need. Performance Boosters: Mods like LazyDFU and Very Many Players (VMP) optimize performance for smoother gameplay, reducing lags and enhancing overall responsiveness. Installation Instructions: Download and install Fabric for minecraft 1.20.2. Download this modpack. Import the modpack into the Modrinth application. Launch Minecraft with the Modrinth application. Enjoy an enriched Hypixel Skyblock experience with a fusion of these incredible mods.

















Note: Always ensure compatibility before using the modpack. Disclaimer: Remember to adhere to the server's guidelines and rules regarding mod usage to ensure fair play and an enjoyable experience for all players.
